listening.title: Listening: Likes and dislikes
listening.transcript: I enjoy reading books in my free time. She hates waiting in long queues. I miss living in my hometown.

questions.question: What does the speaker enjoy?
questions.explanation: "I enjoy reading books in my free time."

listening.title: Listening: Size and capacity
listening.transcript: This bag is too heavy for me to carry. He isn't tall enough to reach the shelf. The room is too small for ten people.

questions.question: Why can't the writer carry the bag?
questions.explanation: "This bag is too heavy for me to carry."
